poam_items.title: SI-4 Alert Instrumentation Coverage

remediation_plan.description: Implement or enable SIEM detection for the assessed semantic with accountable recipients.
Add on-call / governance distribution lists to the rule.
Generate sample alert payload or saved-search proof with timestamps.
Link alert to incident or change response workflow.
Re-run SI-4 alert instrumentation evaluation.

poam_items.customer_impact: Elevated exposure window with plausible exploitation or audit failure absent timely remediation.
poam_items.weakness_description: No evidence was provided showing an enabled, accountable alert path exists for the assessed risk signal affecting `logging.audit_disabled`. Observed gap: No alert rules are defined while security-relevant semantic events require instrumentation.
